mechanism: Chinese geopolitically motivated selling (from ~$1.08T to ~$770B, accelerating under stress) is the single largest component of the reserve manager de-accumulation trend. Unlike Japanese economically motivated selling, it is irreversible under current geopolitical conditions.
regime_dependence: Accelerates under US-China tensions. Would slow or reverse only under major geopolitical de-escalation, which appears unlikely through the medium term.
